title: Bridge Essay: The Radically Embodied Conscious Cybernetic Bayesian Brain: From Free Energy to Free Will and Back Again.
concept: Emptiness from predictive processing — the self as inference, dependent arising as Bayes-optimal perception.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent Arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness from predictive processing — the self as inference, dependent arising as Bayes-optimal perception.

**The Radically Embodied Conscious Cybernetic Bayesian Brain: From Free Energy to Free Will and Back Again.** - Entropy (Basel, Switzerland) (2021). DOI: 10.3390/e23060783. PMID: 34202965. Drawing from both enactivist and cognitivist perspectives on mind, I propose that explaining teleological phenomena may require reappraising both "Cartesian theaters" and mental homunculi in terms of embodied self-models (ESMs), understood as body maps with agentic properties, functioning as predictive-memory systems and cybernetic controllers. Quasi-homuncular ESMs are suggested to constitute a major organizing principle for neural architectures due to their initial and ongoing significance for
